// Function to check if the pattern meets the requirements  
bool validatePattern(const vector<string>& pattern) {  
    for (size_t i = 0; i < pattern.size() - 1; ++i) {  
        if (pattern[i][0] == pattern[i + 1][0] && pattern[i][0] != 'j') {  
            return false;

    }

}
